vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on wing spar attachment due to uneven heat distribution.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management features to ensure even heat dissipation.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment in bay door actuator due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Increase manufacturing tolerance and perform alignment checks during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cooling airflow in motor pod due to design constraints.
risk.mit: Optimize cooling inlet and outlet designs to improve airflow.

risk.desc: Potential for bolt circle misalignment in motor mount due to manufacturing errors.
risk.mit: Implement strict quality control measures for bolt circle manufacturing.

risk.desc: Risk of structural weakness in electronics bay due to material limitations.
risk.mit: Use a combination of materials to reinforce the electronics bay.

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

requirements: Structures: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
Spar_socket, main_spar, anti_rotation_key, rib, carry_through, frame
Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads are visible and labeled
Critical slip, snap, pin, hinge, and slide interfaces state plausible clearances
Each subsystem has at least three adjacent interfaces or datums
Fits are named with standard intent: clearance fit for sliding, transition for locating, interference/press only where justified, with a numeric allowance
Holes, slots, and pockets match real catalog hardware sizes
Spar socket, anti-rotation keys, and center datum remain visible and inspectable
Payload bay is labeled non-weapon/display-only with removable mission/sensor module
Battery bay uses slide rail, CG marks, and independent payload/battery removal
Lift, landing, and payload loads trace through continuous structure: spar to carry-through to fuselage frames, with fittings at every load transfer

verify.value: All required features are present in the part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All features in the part_tree are traceable to geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each physical feature must include args.at [x,y,z] and real dimensions.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal naming and connection details.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible locking/preload evidence.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment due to complex assembly of 2-piece spar.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment tools and detailed assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient structural integrity if rib spacing is not optimized.
risk.mit: Conduct finite element analysis to optimize rib spacing.

risk.desc: Risk of misfit in bolted interfaces if tolerances are not strictly adhered to.
risk.mit: Ensure all bolted interfaces have proper clearance and fit.

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment of main spar with fuselage frames.
risk.mit: Implement alignment features and verify alignment during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient preload or locking in critical joints.
risk.mit: Ensure all critical joints have visible locking/preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential mis-mating risk due to lack of keying on XT60 connectors.
risk.mit: Add keying or labeling to XT60 connectors to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Inadequate strain relief for power harnesses may lead to cable damage.
risk.mit: Ensure every cable exit shows strain relief geometry and respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Top access hatch may be prone to accidental opening during flight.
risk.mit: Implement a secure locking mechanism for the top access hatch.

risk.desc: CG rail marks may become obscured during assembly.
risk.mit: Ensure CG rail marks remain visible and inspectable post-assembly.

risk.desc: Potential for poor thermal management if cooling airflow is obstructed.
risk.mit: Ensure cooling airflow path is clear and unobstructed.
